## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing API)
- [ ] Docs / chore (no code change)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have added unit tests for new behaviour / regressions.
- [ ] I have added or updated a Storybook story (`stories:check` passes).
- [ ] I have run `npm run typecheck`, `npm run lint`, and `npm test` locally.
- [ ] I have added a changeset (`npx changeset`) unless this PR is docs-only.
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation (README / CHANGELOG / docs).

<!-- For visual changes, include before/after screenshots -->
